lines.lyric: Nan geuraetteon geot gata nega eodi itteonji
lines.lyric_hangul: 난 그랬던 것 같아 네가 어디 있던지
lines.lyric_translation: Wherever you were

lines.lyric: Deullil ttaeramyeon gomindo eopshi ttwieo gasseotteon
lines.lyric_hangul: 들릴 때라면 고민도 없이 뛰어 갔었던
lines.lyric_translation: If I could hear you, I would run to you without second thoughts
Back then, back then

lines.lyric: Eoryeotteon nae mameun jitgujeun jangnani dayeotna bwa
lines.lyric_hangul: 어렸던 내 맘은 짓궂은 장난이 다였나 봐
lines.lyric_translation: My young heart was only so playful back then

lines.lyric: Utneun neoreul boneun nae gibuni mwonji
lines.lyric_hangul: 웃는 너를 보는 내 기분이 뭔지
lines.lyric_translation: When I see you smile, I felt something
Cause I never learned any of this

lines.lyric: Pyohyeoneul mot haesseo nae mami seotulleoseo
lines.lyric_hangul: 표현을 못 했어 내 맘이 서툴러서
lines.lyric_translation: I couldn’t express my feelings because I was too young

lines.lyric: Neoye naeiri doego shipeoseo oneureul sarawasseo
lines.lyric_hangul: 너의 내일이 되고 싶어서 오늘을 살아왔어
lines.lyric_translation: I wanted to be your tomorrow so I lived today

lines.lyric: Neoreul cheoeum bon nal geuttaebuteo jigeumkkaji
lines.lyric_hangul: 너를 처음 본 날 그때부터 지금까지
lines.lyric_translation: Ever since the first day I saw you until now
In my heart, it’s only you
These typical words
I’m only saying them now

lines.lyric: Ppeonhadippeonhan i mari jeonhaeneun jilkkayo yeah
lines.lyric_hangul: 뻔하디뻔한 이 말이 전해는 질까요 yeah
lines.lyric_translation: But I hope these typical words will reach you
Thank you, thank you, that’s all I can say
Even all the waiting, the longing
And all of our memories
Thank you
Thank you

lines.lyric: Neomu heunhan marira nae maeumi damgilkka
lines.lyric_hangul: 너무 흔한 말이라 내 마음이 담길까
lines.lyric_translation: Because they’re such common words
I was worried it wouldn’t sound sincere
I was looking for something better than just thank you
So I couldn’t tell you thank you
I couldn’t express my feelings
Because I wasn’t brave enough
If only I knew love a little earlier

lines.lyric: Neoreul cheoeum bon nal geuttaebuteo jigeumkkaji
lines.lyric_hangul: 너를 처음 본 날 그때부터 지금까지
lines.lyric_translation: Ever since the first day I saw you until now
In my heart, it’s only you
These typical words
I’m only saying them now

lines.lyric: Ppeonhadippeonhan i mari jeonhaeneun jilkkayo yeah
lines.lyric_hangul: 뻔하디뻔한 이 말이 전해는 질까요 yeah
lines.lyric_translation: But I hope these typical words will reach you
Thank you, thank you, that’s all I can say
How to wait and what love is
You taught me all
Thank you
Thank you

lines.lyric: Nae mam byeonhaji ana jeoldae byeonhaji ana
lines.lyric_hangul: 내 맘 변하지 않아 절대 변하지 않아
lines.lyric_translation: My heart won’t change, it won’t ever change
Even if you erase me
We won’t change
Because we’re engraved in each other’s hearts / (Engraved)
Thank you
Thank you

lines.lyric_hangul: 너에게 너에게 전해졌음 해 이 노래가 고맙다 고맙다
lines.lyric_translation: I hope this reaches you, this song / Thank you / Thank you

parts.lyric: Neoege neoege jeonhaejyeosseum hae i noraega
